readiness_items.name: Gate Spine
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Needs expansion governance for whole-repo tasks.
readiness_items.next_fix: Adopt U14-U18 drafts into audit and execution checkers.

readiness_items.name: Report Output Budget
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Legacy warning flood still noisy in repo-level checks.
readiness_items.next_fix: Apply budget discipline to new whole-repo reports.

readiness_items.name: Python Type Safety
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Strict-clean is not complete in promoted tool zones.
readiness_items.next_fix: Run inventory and staged hardening by maturity levels.

readiness_items.name: Script Pain Chronicle
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Must keep pain-to-law conversion active in later tasks.
readiness_items.next_fix: Enforce conversion loop in roadmap execution tasks.

readiness_items.name: Second Brain V0.7 Visual Foundation
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Foundation exists but full runtime truth baseline incomplete.
readiness_items.next_fix: Close static asset route truth blockers before full acceptance.

readiness_items.name: Performance/Fake-Green Tooling
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Tooling exists; some measurements blocked by missing required assets.
readiness_items.next_fix: Re-run with required assets loaded and truthful acceptance criteria.

readiness_items.name: Full Runtime Audit
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Blocked by required assets missing / route mismatch.
readiness_items.next_fix: Perform runtime static-asset route fix task and re-validate.

readiness_items.name: Control Center
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Only requirements in this task; implementation absent.
readiness_items.next_fix: Create data spine contract then implement MVP panels.

readiness_items.name: Scriptorium Tool Absorption
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Absorption doctrine exists; whole-repo map not yet executed.
readiness_items.next_fix: Produce tool absorption map for test-version technologies.

readiness_items.name: Agent Factory
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Concept only; no operational passports/checkers yet.
readiness_items.next_fix: Define agent passport schema and compliance checker.

readiness_items.name: Freelance Corridor
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Contract drafted; intake/execution toolchain not built.
readiness_items.next_fix: Implement corridor intake and packaging flow with gates.

readiness_items.name: Deliverable Factory
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Factory blocks defined but not implemented.
readiness_items.next_fix: Implement block runners and delivery receipts.

readiness_items.name: Bilingual UI
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Policy exists; no runtime UI implementation yet.
readiness_items.next_fix: Enforce U16 in control center and owner-facing apps.

readiness_items.name: Visual Construction
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Intentionally deferred until truth/data/control prerequisites complete.
readiness_items.next_fix: Start only after Stage 5-10 readiness gates are met.

readiness_items.name: Whole-Repo Fusion
readiness_items.blocker_or_warning: Fusion depends on outputs of all prior stages.
readiness_items.next_fix: Execute sequence from whole-repo truth inventory forward.

global_blockers: Runtime baseline blocked by required asset route truth mismatch.
Control center, agent factory, freelance corridor, and deliverable factory are doctrine-level only.
